subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. He giveth life and causeth death, then quickeneth through His grace whomsoever He willeth. He, verily, is the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو یحیی و یمیت ثم یحیی بفضله کیف یشاء انه لهو المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
